rule_metadata.name: executable_pe
rule_metadata.description: Detect PE executable based on MZ and PE magic

rules.rule_text:
rule executable_pe : info executable windows
{
	meta:
		description = "Detect PE executable based on MZ and PE magic"

	strings:
		$pe = "PE"

	condition:
		uint16be( 0 ) == 0x4d5a and ( $pe at ( uint32( 0x3c ) ) )
}

rule_metadata.name: executable_elf32
rule_metadata.description: Detect ELF 32 bit executable based on ELF magic

rules.rule_text:
rule executable_elf32 : info executable linux
{
	meta:
		description = "Detect ELF 32 bit executable based on ELF magic"

	condition:
		uint32be( 0 ) == 0x7f454c46 and uint8( 4 ) == 0x01
}

rule_metadata.name: executable_elf64
rule_metadata.description: Detect ELF 64 bit executable based on ELF magic

rules.rule_text:
rule executable_elf64 : info executable linux
{
	meta:
		description = "Detect ELF 64 bit executable based on ELF magic"

	condition:
		uint32be( 0 ) == 0x7f454c46 and uint8( 4 ) == 0x02
}
